audience: students, mentors, academic administrators, colleges, universities
title: MentorHub
summary: An all-in-one portal connecting mentors and mentees to streamline project guidance, report submissions, academic queries, and interactive sessions.
overview: MentorHub is a robust Next.js application designed to bridge the gap between college mentors and students. By integrating Firebase Auth, Realtime Database, and Cloud Storage, it provides a secure, role-based platform where administrators manage users, mentors schedule classes and review project reports, and mentees upload assignments, submit queries, and join guidance sessions.
longDescription: Designed as a comprehensive college project management platform, MentorHub streamlines the administrative and collaborative aspects of mentor-mentee groups. Students can submit progress reports, ask academic queries, schedule 1-on-1 sessions, and upload deliverables. Mentors gain access to a dedicated suite of tools to manage mentee profiles, track project reports, coordinate classes, and resolve queries. Administrators have absolute control over user onboarding, role management, and database assignment. Packed with premium dashboard analytics (using Recharts) and robust document generation features (PDF and Excel exports), it transforms academic project guidance into a structured, trackable, and highly productive experience.
features: Role-Based Dashboards: Dedicated secure dashboard layouts custom-tailored for Admins, Mentors, and Mentees
Digital Portfolio Tracker: Structured mentee portal to upload and submit academic progress and milestone reports
Evaluation Panel: Advanced mentor suite to audit, review, comment, and grade submitted student reports
Interactive Query Board: Real-time discussion forum for students to ask academic queries and mentors to answer them
Attendance & Classroom Manager: Automated log logs for mentors to track class schedules and student attendance on-the-go
Meeting Coordination Engine: Built-in calendar scheduling tool to organize 1-on-1 progress guidance sessions
Recharts Visual Analytics: Beautiful telemetry charts rendering student grades, query resolutions, and attendance trends
jsPDF Document compiler: Custom script compiling and exporting clean PDF reports, attendance logs, and student evaluations
XLSX Dynamic Sheets: Seamless spreadsheet integration allowing admins to import student rosters and export logs
EmailJS Alerts: Automated email dispatch systems notifying users instantly of meeting schedules or resolved queries
Mobile-First Sidebar Drawer: Responsive slide-in navigation panel designed for effortless smartphone browsing
Tailwind Dark Mode: Premium light & dark theme switching built completely with Tailwind transition animations
